assertions.title: Authenticated mark creates application and returns correct shape

steps.action: POST with valid session, allowed email, valid originalUrl
steps.expected: HTTP 200 with jobId, companyName, jobTitle, jobLocation, externalJobId, applications
steps.observed: HTTP 200 returned with all expected keys and correct types

steps.expected: Non-empty array with id, appliedAt, resumeVersion, profileLabel, notes, userName, userEmail
steps.observed: Array has 1 entry with all required keys
No workspaceId found in serialized response

evidence.testName: returns 200 with MarkAppliedResponse for valid request (VAL-MARK-001)

assertions.title: Optional metadata fields stored and returned

steps.action: POST with resumeVersion='v2.1', profileLabel='Frontend', notes='Applied via referral'
steps.expected: Application entry returns matching values; mutation called with metadata
steps.observed: Application entry has resumeVersion='v2.1', profileLabel='Frontend', notes='Applied via referral'; mutation args confirmed

steps.expected: Mutation called without metadata (undefined); response shows null
steps.observed: callArgs.resumeVersion/profileLabel/notes are undefined; response shows null for all three

testNames: stores and returns resumeVersion, profileLabel, and notes (VAL-MARK-002)
treats whitespace-only metadata values as null/undefined (VAL-MARK-002)

assertions.title: Override fields (companyName, jobTitle, jobLocation, externalJobId) respected

steps.action: POST with override fields including leading/trailing whitespace ('  Google  ')
steps.expected: Convex mutation receives trimmed values; response reflects overrides
steps.observed: callArgs.companyName='Google' (trimmed); response companyName='Google', jobTitle='Senior SWE', jobLocation='Mountain View', externalJobId='G-12345'

evidence.testName: passes override fields to Convex, trimmed (VAL-MARK-003)

steps.expected: Response jobId matches matchedJobId; mutation called with matchedJobId

evidence.testName: passes matchedJobId to Convex and returns matching jobId (VAL-MARK-004)

assertions.title: Idempotent — same user+job does not create duplicate application

steps.action: Two identical POSTs from same user for same job URL
steps.expected: Same jobId; applications array has exactly 1 entry for the user

evidence.testName: same user+job does not create duplicate application (VAL-MARK-005)

assertions.title: Multiple users can apply to the same job

steps.action: User A marks, then User B marks same job
steps.expected: User B's response has 2 applications with distinct emails

evidence.testName: both users' applications are returned for the same job (VAL-MARK-006)

steps.observed: HTTP 401; body has exactly one key 'error' with non-empty string
HTTP 403; body has exactly one key 'error' with non-empty string

testNames: returns DISTINCT error messages for 401 vs 403

assertions.title: Missing, empty, or malformed originalUrl returns 400

testNames: returns 400 for empty object body (missing originalUrl)

assertions.title: Insufficient identity fields returns structured error

steps.action: POST with URL that produces no canonical keys (https://example.com/) and no overrides
steps.expected: HTTP 400 with descriptive error about insufficient identity; never 500
steps.observed: HTTP 400; body.error is a non-empty string; status is not 500

evidence.testName: returns structured error for URL with no canonical keys and no overrides (VAL-MARK-009)

steps.expected: HTTP 200 (falls through to canonical key lookup), never 500
steps.observed: HTTP 200 with valid jobId; mutation called twice (first rejected, second succeeded without matchedJobId)
HTTP 200 with valid jobId; mutation retried without matchedJobId

testNames: invalid matchedJobId falls through gracefully, never 500 (VAL-MARK-010)

assertions.title: Re-mark does not overwrite existing application metadata

steps.action: First mark with resumeVersion='v1.0', profileLabel='Original', notes='First apply'
Second mark with resumeVersion='v2.0', profileLabel='Updated', notes='Second apply attempt'
steps.expected: Application STILL has v1.0 metadata (original preserved)

evidence.testName: re-mark does NOT update existing application metadata (VAL-MARK-011)

assertions.title: First-use experience — empty database works end-to-end

steps.action: POST on fresh database with valid URL
steps.expected: HTTP 200; creates workspace, user, job, application; returns valid response
steps.observed: HTTP 200; body.jobId='fresh-job-id', companyName='Nutrien', applications[0].userEmail='allowed@example.com'; mutation called with correct originalUrl

evidence.testName: creates workspace, user, job, and application on fresh database (VAL-CROSS-007)

summary: Tested 12 assertions (VAL-MARK-001 through VAL-MARK-011 and VAL-CROSS-007) across 23 unit tests: all 12 assertions pass. All tests completed in 45ms with 0 failures. No frictions or blockers encountered.
